seoTitle: Create a Trifold Brochure in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to design a trifold brochure in Canva, from setup to export, for events, product launches, and marketing materials.
intro: A well-designed trifold brochure can make a strong impression for events, product launches, or informational handouts. This guide covers setting up your document and designing a brochure using Canva's tools.

steps.heading: Setting up your document
steps.body: Create a new Canva document with trifold dimensions, keeping in mind the three panels that will fold together.

steps.heading: Choosing colors and fonts
steps.body: Select a color scheme and typography that align with your brand or event to keep the brochure visually cohesive.

steps.heading: Adding images and text
steps.body: Fill each panel with relevant images and text, balancing visual elements with readable content.

steps.heading: Exporting your final design
steps.body: Once finished, export the brochure in the appropriate format for print or digital distribution.

faq.question: What size should a trifold brochure be?
faq.answer: Trifold brochures are commonly designed on standard letter-sized paper divided into three equal panels, though sizes can vary by use case.

faq.question: Can I use Canva templates for a trifold brochure?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva offers pre-made trifold templates that can be customized instead of starting from scratch.

faq.question: Is this suitable for small business marketing?
faq.answer: Yes, trifold brochures are a common marketing tool for small businesses promoting products, services, or events.

faq.question: Can I export the brochure ready for professional printing?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva allows you to export in print-ready formats suitable for most professional printing services.
